back_translation: The lot came out for the sons of Joseph from the Jordan of Jericho, to the waters of Jericho on the east; the wilderness going up from Jericho into the hill country of Bethel.
And it went out from Bethel (Luz) and passed to the border of the Archite at Ataroth.
Then it went down westward to the border of the Japhletite, as far as the border of Lower Beth-horon and as far as Gezer; and its outgoings were to the sea.
So the sons of Joseph — Manasseh and Ephraim — received their inheritance.
Now the border of the sons of Ephraim according to their clans: the border of their inheritance on the east was Ataroth-addar, as far as Upper Beth-horon.
And the border went out to the sea (west); Michmethath on the north; and the border turned eastward to Taanath-shiloh, and passed by it eastward to Janoah.
From Janoah it went down to Ataroth and to Naarah, and reached Jericho, and went out at the Jordan.
From Tappuah the border went westward to the Wadi of Kanah, and its outgoings were at the sea. This is the inheritance of the tribe of the sons of Ephraim according to their clans,
and the cities set apart for the sons of Ephraim in the midst of the inheritance of the sons of Manasseh — all the cities with their villages.
But they did not drive out the Canaanite who dwelt in Gezer; so the Canaanite has dwelt in the midst of Ephraim to this day, and became forced labor.
